channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping at end of Relf Road, 23rd March
item.description:
A washing machine and other electrical items were left over the weekend 21/03/2026 at the southern end of Relf Road at the junction with Relf Passage adjacent to Bellenden School.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dewar Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet and black bags of household waste, 23rd March
item.description:
Green waste bin broken with no lid and needs replacing. Green bin not emptied because of contamination and overflowing with rubbish into street. Carpet and black bags of household waste, ongoing issue of rubbish from bins from 46 A, B , C Dalyell Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial waste not collected for days, 23rd March
item.description:
This is a persistent and recurring failure to collect waste from restaurants in the area. The situation has deteriorated significantly and now constitutes a clear public health hazard for residents, in addition to severely damaging the cleanliness and overall appearance of the street. Immediate and sustained action is required to resolve this issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106,108,110, Bermondsey Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped garden waste, 23rd March
item.description:
Dumped garden waste. Property let by Dexters. Landlord can be contacted through estate agent 0207 483 6364

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter accumulating for days now, 23rd March
item.description:
